Precondition: Right end-effector grasping tennis_ball_2; tennis_ball_1 on top of box_1; box_2 top accessible; left end-effector empty.
Postcondition: tennis_ball_2 placed on box_2; left end-effector grasping tennis_ball_1; box_1 top no longer blocked by tennis_ball_1.

Precondition: Left end-effector grasping tennis_ball_1; table top available.
Postcondition: tennis_ball_1 placed on table; box_1 top free of objects.
